free_text: Fast neutron scattering from Zr-90 and Zr-92
5.5 MV van de Graaff accelerator and
a mobley type nano-second ion buncher.
Deuteron beam onto a 3 cm long gas cell
under a pressure of up to 920. torr.
Metallic right cylinders of 2.0 cm diam and
Scattering samples were placed at a distance
of about 10. cm from the centre of the cell. The
detectors was used. Each detector was of a 12.7 cm
diam * 5.08 cm long Ne213 liquid scintillator
coupled to a RCA C70133B photomultiplier.
Compared with calculations using the coupled-channel
optical model theory and the hauser-feshbach formula.
Multiple scattering and attenuation of neutrons
Total error given. It includes statistics,
errors in the relative efficiency of the detectors
and the error due to the multiple scattering
